title: Director of Meetings and Events
best_brightspace_angle: Association/member education or professional learning modernization
likely_pain: Need to validate whether there is a real learning, credentialing, member education, or workforce program worth pursuing.
recommended_next_move: Verify contact info, then send a short role-specific note
contact_research_gap: Verify current remit, work email, and whether the organization has a formal learning/CE/member education program.
likely_objection: We already have a system / this is not a current priority.
human_response: Totally fair. I’m not trying to force a project. Usually the useful compare is whether the current setup makes education easier to grow or just adds admin work.
